author: mark
text:
Lenient TaskType deserialization for forward compat

Mirrors Status and LinkType lenient-serde pattern. Older bl reading
a future variant preserves it through a load/save cycle instead of
erroring. parse() stays strict at the CLI boundary. Splits TaskType
into src/task_type.rs because task.rs was at 298 lines after the
Status change; follows link.rs split precedent.
